title: OpenStack installer
description: Configuration for one OpenStack installation (upstream OpenStack-Helm, release 2025.1). Only the fields declared here can be set on a Composition; everything else uses the chart defaults in values.yaml. With an empty spec you get the default identity control plane: MariaDB + Memcached + Keystone. Compute (nova/neutron/VMs) is intentionally not part of this blueprint.

keystone.title: Keystone (Identity)
keystone.description: The OpenStack Identity service. Always deployed; it issues Fernet tokens and owns the service catalog.

api.title: Keystone API replicas
api.description: Number of keystone-api replicas. Use 1 for single-node clusters (kind/minikube).

mariadb.title: MariaDB
mariadb.description: The OpenStack relational datastore. Always deployed.

server.title: MariaDB server replicas
server.description: Number of MariaDB servers. Use 1 on kind (no Galera clustering). 3 for HA on a real cluster.

rabbitmq.title: RabbitMQ (message bus)
rabbitmq.description: Optional OpenStack message bus. Required only for notifications and multi-service installs. Leave disabled on Apple-Silicon kind (the Erlang VM does not run under emulation).

enabled.title: Deploy RabbitMQ
enabled.description: Deploy RabbitMQ and re-enable Keystone's rabbit-init job and notifications.

glance.title: Glance (Image service)
glance.description: Optional OpenStack Image service. Stores image records in MariaDB and image data on a PVC.

enabled.title: Deploy Glance
enabled.description: Deploy the Glance image service alongside Keystone.

horizon.title: Horizon (Dashboard)
horizon.description: Optional OpenStack web dashboard, exposed on a NodePort.

enabled.title: Deploy Horizon
enabled.description: Deploy the Horizon dashboard alongside Keystone.

port.title: Dashboard NodePort
port.description: Node port (30000-32767) to expose the Horizon dashboard on. Line this up with your kind extraPortMappings.
